isolation.command: cd agent && npx vitest run src/__tests__/edit-cancel.test.ts src/__tests__/multi-task-chat.test.ts src/__tests__/db-schema-migration.test.ts --reporter=verbose

steps.action: Read test source for VAL-EDIT-001 tests
steps.expected: Tests verify due_at update and remind_at recalculation
steps.observed: 5 tests in 'time update with single active task (VAL-EDIT-001)' block: verify 'actually make that 9', 'change it to 5pm', 'make that 9', 'reschedule to 5pm' all trigger todosUpdate with due_at, remind_at, and status='pending'; sendMessage confirms update mentioning task name

steps.expected: All VAL-EDIT-001 tests pass
steps.observed: All 5 tests passed: updates due_at, recalculates remind_at, sends confirmation containing 'updated' and task name

steps.expected: Tests check actual Supabase update calls with correct fields
steps.observed: Tests verify todosUpdate called with due_at, remind_at, status='pending'; verify sendMessage contains 'updated' and task name

keyTests: "actually make that 9" updates due_at to 9 PM and recalculates remind_at
"change it to 5pm" updates due_at to 5 PM
"make that 9" (without "actually") updates due_at
"reschedule to 5pm" updates due_at
time update recalculates remind_at via updateTodoDueAt

steps.action: Read test source for VAL-EDIT-002 tests
steps.expected: Tests verify due_at shifts to tomorrow at same time
steps.observed: 3 tests in 'date update "not today, tomorrow" (VAL-EDIT-002)' block: verify date shifts exactly 24h, with and without comma, remind_at recalculated

steps.expected: All VAL-EDIT-002 tests pass
steps.observed: All 3 tests passed: newDueAt - originalDueAt = 24*60*60*1000, remind_at updated, status='pending'

steps.expected: Tests check exact 24-hour shift and remind_at recalculation
steps.observed: Tests compute exact millisecond difference (86400000ms = 24h), verify updateCall has remind_at and status='pending'

keyTests: "not today, tomorrow" shifts due_at to tomorrow at the same time
"not today tomorrow" (without comma) also works
"not today, tomorrow" also recalculates remind_at

steps.action: Read test source for VAL-EDIT-003 tests
steps.expected: Tests verify status=canceled, canceled_at stamped, row persists
steps.observed: 5 tests in 'cancel with single active task (VAL-EDIT-003, VAL-STATUS-003)' block: verify 'cancel that', 'cancel it', 'nevermind', 'cancel [task name]' set status=canceled, canceled_at is valid ISO string, row persists (update not delete)

steps.expected: All VAL-EDIT-003 tests pass
steps.observed: All 5 tests passed: status=canceled, canceled_at stamped, no delete called, sendMessage confirms 'canceled' and task name

steps.expected: Tests verify actual update call with canceled status and timestamp
steps.observed: Tests check updateCall has status='canceled', canceled_at truthy and parseable as Date, verify delete is undefined on todos table mock

keyTests: "cancel that" with one active task sets status=canceled and canceled_at
"cancel it" with one active task cancels the task
"nevermind" cancels the single active task
"cancel [task name]" cancels the matching task
canceled task stays in DB with canceled_at stamped (row persists)

steps.action: Read test source for VAL-EDIT-004 tests
steps.expected: Tests verify disambiguation prompt when multiple tasks active
steps.observed: 5 tests in 'ambiguous edit target with multiple tasks (VAL-EDIT-004)': verify 'make that 9', 'cancel that', 'change it to 5pm', 'reschedule to tomorrow' with 2 active tasks all trigger disambiguation with 'which task' prompt listing both task names

steps.expected: All VAL-EDIT-004 tests pass
steps.observed: All 5 tests passed: sendMessage contains 'which task' and both task names, sessionsInsert called to create awaiting_edit_target session

steps.expected: Tests check disambiguation message and session creation
steps.observed: Tests verify sentText.toLowerCase().contains('which task'), sentText.contains both task names, sessionsInsert called for disambiguation session

keyTests: "make that 9" with multiple active tasks triggers disambiguation
"cancel that" with multiple active tasks triggers disambiguation
"change it to 5pm" with multiple tasks triggers disambiguation
disambiguation creates a session with awaiting_edit_target state
"reschedule to tomorrow" with multiple tasks triggers disambiguation

steps.action: Read test source for VAL-EDGE-002 tests
steps.expected: Tests verify helpful error message, no crash
steps.observed: 6 tests in 'zero active tasks returns helpful error (VAL-EDGE-002)': verify 'cancel that', 'make that 9', 'change it to 5pm', 'nevermind', 'reschedule to tomorrow', 'cancel get food' all return handled=true with sendMessage containing "don't have any active"

steps.expected: All VAL-EDGE-002 tests pass
steps.observed: All 6 tests passed: handled=true, action='edit_cancel_done', sendMessage called with helpful error

steps.expected: Tests confirm no crash and user-friendly error
steps.observed: Tests verify result.handled=true (no crash), sentText.toLowerCase().contains("don't have any active") for all variants

keyTests: "cancel that" with zero active tasks returns helpful message
"make that 9" with zero active tasks returns helpful message
"change it to 5pm" with zero active tasks returns helpful message
"nevermind" with zero active tasks returns helpful message
"reschedule to tomorrow" with zero active tasks returns helpful message
"cancel get food" with zero active tasks returns helpful message

assertions.title: Clear multi-task split into separate todos

steps.action: Read test source for VAL-MULTI-001 tests
steps.expected: Tests verify two separate todo records created with individual details
steps.observed: 4 tests in 'clear multi-task creates separate todos (VAL-MULTI-001)': verify 'text mom at 6 and buy milk at 7', 'call mom at 3pm and pick up groceries at 5pm', comma-split variant all create 2 todos (todosInsert called twice) with 2 confirmation messages

steps.expected: All VAL-MULTI-001 tests pass
steps.observed: All 4 tests passed: action='multi_task', todosInsert called 2 times, sendMessage called 2 times per multi-task input

steps.expected: Tests confirm separate inserts and separate confirmations
steps.observed: Tests check todosInsert.toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2), sendMessage.toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2), each message contains 'remind'

keyTests: "text mom at 6 and buy milk at 7" creates 2 separate todo records
each split task gets its own confirmation message
"call mom at 3pm and pick up groceries at 5pm" creates 2 tasks
"remind me to get food at 8, call mom at 9" (comma split) creates 2 tasks

assertions.title: Partially ambiguous multi-task asks to resend

steps.action: Read test source for VAL-MULTI-002 tests
steps.expected: Tests verify no todos created and clarification message sent
steps.observed: 2 tests in 'partially ambiguous multi-task asks to resend (VAL-MULTI-002)': primary test verifies 'text mom at 6 and buy milk sometime tonight maybe' creates zero todos and sends 'resend' message; secondary test handles lenient case

steps.expected: All VAL-MULTI-002 tests pass
steps.observed: Both tests passed: todosInsert not called, sendMessage sends 1 message containing 'resend'

steps.expected: Tests confirm zero creation and clarification
steps.observed: Primary test checks todosInsert.not.toHaveBeenCalled() and sentText.toLowerCase().contains('resend')

keyTests: "text mom at 6 and buy milk sometime tonight maybe" creates zero todos
"call boss at 3pm and do something later" creates zero todos and asks to resend

steps.observed: 8 tests in 'greetings always get friendly response (VAL-CHAT-001)': parameterized loop tests Hi, Hello, Hey, good morning, good evening, good afternoon; plus tests verifying greetings work before session processing and regardless of active sessions

steps.expected: All VAL-CHAT-001 tests pass
steps.observed: All 8 tests passed: action='greeting', sendMessage called once with non-empty response, LLM not called

steps.expected: Tests confirm friendly reply for each variant
steps.observed: Tests verify result.action='greeting', sendMessage.toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1), sentText.length > 0 for all variants including Hi, Hello, Hey

keyTests: "Hi" receives a friendly response
"Hello" receives a friendly response
"Hey" receives a friendly response
greeting check runs BEFORE session/task processing
greeting responds regardless of active sessions

steps.observed: 5 tests in 'ack keeps in_progress task and sends brief reply (VAL-CHAT-002)': verify 'on it', 'got it', 'ok', 'yeah' with in_progress task keep status unchanged (todosUpdate NOT called), send ack mentioning task name

steps.expected: All VAL-CHAT-002 tests pass
steps.observed: All 5 tests passed: action='ack', todosUpdate.not.toHaveBeenCalled(), sendMessage sends ack containing task name

steps.expected: Tests confirm status unchanged and ack sent
steps.observed: Tests check result.action='ack', todosUpdate.not.toHaveBeenCalled() (status stays in_progress), sendMessage.toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1), sentText.contains(taskName)

"got it" with in_progress task keeps status and sends ack
"ok" with in_progress task keeps status and sends ack
"yeah" with in_progress task keeps status and sends ack
ack with active session uses session task label

steps.action: Read test source for VAL-CHAT-003 tests
steps.expected: Tests verify 'done' moves task to done status with completed_at
steps.observed: 4 tests in '"done" with in_progress task marks it done (VAL-CHAT-003, VAL-STATUS-002)': verify 'done' and 'finished' set status=done, completed_at stamped as valid ISO string, works via follow-up session too

steps.observed: All 4 tests passed: todosUpdate called with status='done', completed_at defined and valid, sendMessage confirms completion

steps.observed: Tests verify updateCall.status='done', updateCall.completed_at defined, typeof completed_at is 'string', new Date(completed_at).getTime() > 0

keyTests: "done" with single active task marks it done
"finished" with single active task also marks done
"done" sets completed_at timestamp (VAL-STATUS-002)
"done" via follow-up session also marks task done

steps.action: Read test source for VAL-DB-001 tests
steps.expected: Tests verify conversation_sessions table creation with all required fields
steps.observed: 14 tests in '003_conversation_sessions.sql' block: verify table creation, all required fields (id, user_id, related_todo_id, state, task_label_snapshot, candidate_todo_ids, resolved_at, timestamps), FK constraints, CHECK constraints for session states, JSONB type, RLS, indexes, triggers

steps.expected: All VAL-DB-001 tests pass
steps.observed: All 14 tests passed: migration SQL verified for CREATE TABLE, all columns, UUID PK, FK to users, nullable FK to todos, CHECK constraint for states, JSONB candidate_todo_ids, RLS enabled, indexes, triggers

steps.expected: Tests inspect actual migration SQL for schema correctness
steps.observed: Tests read migration file and use regex/string matching to verify SQL DDL contains all required schema elements

keyTests: should create the conversation_sessions table
should include all required fields
should define id as UUID PRIMARY KEY
should define user_id as FK to users
should define state with CHECK constraint for all valid states
should define candidate_todo_ids as JSONB nullable
should have resolved_at as nullable TIMESTAMPTZ

assertions.title: todos table updated with new fields

steps.action: Read test source for VAL-DB-002 tests
steps.expected: Tests verify reminded_at, completed_at, canceled_at, not_confirmed_at, updated_at columns and status CHECK
steps.observed: 11 tests in '002_update_status_lifecycle.sql' block: verify new status values (pending, in_progress, done, not_confirmed, canceled), reminded_at, canceled_at, not_confirmed_at, updated_at columns, idempotent patterns, updated_at trigger, indexes, constraint management

steps.expected: All VAL-DB-002 tests pass
steps.observed: All 11 tests passed: migration SQL contains all new columns as TIMESTAMPTZ, CHECK constraint includes all 5 status values, old constraint dropped before new one added

steps.expected: Tests inspect actual migration SQL for column and constraint changes
steps.observed: Tests verify SQL contains reminded_at, canceled_at, not_confirmed_at, updated_at; status CHECK includes 'pending', 'in_progress', 'done', 'not_confirmed', 'canceled'

keyTests: should allow new status values: pending, in_progress, done, not_confirmed, canceled
should add reminded_at TIMESTAMPTZ column
should add canceled_at TIMESTAMPTZ column
should add not_confirmed_at TIMESTAMPTZ column
should ensure updated_at column exists
should drop the old status constraint before adding new one

steps.action: Read test source for VAL-DB-003 tests
steps.expected: Tests verify getOrCreateUser twice with same phone produces no duplicates
steps.observed: 7 tests in 'getOrCreateUser()' block: verify upsert with onConflict='phone', same user returned on double call (user1.id === user2.id), no ignoreDuplicates (avoids PGRST116), uses upsert not insert, ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET pattern

steps.expected: All VAL-DB-003 tests pass
steps.observed: All 7 tests passed: upsert called twice, user1.id === user2.id, onConflict='phone', no ignoreDuplicates, no insert called

steps.expected: Tests confirm upsert safety and no duplicates
steps.observed: Tests verify upsert.toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2), user1 deepEquals user2, user1.id === user2.id, upsertCall[1] has onConflict:'phone' and no ignoreDuplicates, insert.not.toHaveBeenCalled()

keyTests: should return the same user when called twice with the same phone (upsert safety, VAL-DB-003)
should NOT use ignoreDuplicates (which causes PGRST116 for existing users)
should use upsert with onConflict phone, not plain insert
should use ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET (default) to always return the row

summary: Tested 13 assertions: 13 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All 113 tests across 3 test files passed. Each assertion is covered by multiple meaningful tests that verify the specified behavior through mocked Supabase/LLM/iMessage dependencies.
